title: Majulah Package – Retirement Savings Bonus
text:
Majulah Package – Retirement Savings Bonus - SupportGoWhere
Majulah Package – Retirement Savings Bonus
Share link
One-off bonus for seniors with CPF retirement savings below the 2023 Basic Retirement Sum.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Eligible seniors can receive $1,000 or $1,500 one-off CPF bonus
No application needed
Collapse all sections
About this support

$1,000 or $1,500 one-off Retirement Savings bonus given in December 2024, tiered by CPF retirement savings.

Who is this for?

Born in 1973 or earlier

Singapore Citizen residing in Singapore

CPF retirement savings below the 2023 Basic Retirement Sum of $99,400

CPF retirement savings refers to the sum of Retirement Account (RA) and CPF LIFE account balances, or the sum of Ordinary Account and Special Account balances if RA has not yet been created

Lives in a property with an Annual Value of up to $25,000

Does not own more than 1 property

How to apply?

No application required.

Where can I find help?

View more details

1800 222 2888

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 01 Apr 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
